calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT AARDVARK STORAGE UNLIMITED, INC. Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint. Appearances: Richard Di Bernardo, Plaintiff in Pro Per and opposing party appearing; Brian Fogarty, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 701-1234 appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike granted, no opposition filed. Court adopts defendant's proposed order as to the language to be stricken and the amendments to be made. Plaintiff allowed ten days leave to amend to comply with order. Plaintiff need not pay the $200.00 sanction before filing the amended complaint. Insufficient notice to grant request to reclassify case to limited jurisdiction. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

(Plaintiff failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3.); Brian Fogarty, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 701-1234, appearing for Defendant and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted, with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed.
